name: Randomized TPE multi-omics healthy-adult trial
summary: A randomized placebo-controlled trial comparing TPE, TPE plus IVIG, and sham in adults over 50 with multi-omic aging-marker readouts.

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Circulating Factor Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers and safety in Adults older than 50 years. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
